input.command:
python3 -c "
import json
fname = 'articles/2026/02/25/articles.jsonl'
kws = ['iran war', 'iran attack', 'iran strike', 'us iran', 'trump iran', 'gorton', 'by-election', 'champions league draw', 'champions league r16', 'russian ship', 'senator prediction', 'manchester united', 'carrick defeat', 'chelsea', 'iran nuclear', 'vienna', 'oslo bomb', 'oslo embassy', 'embassy blast']
with open(fname) as f:
    for line in f:
        art = json.loads(line)
        title = (art.get('title','') or '').lower()
        for kw in kws:
            if kw in title:
                print(f'[{kw}] {(art.get(\"title\",\"\") or \"\")[:140]}')
                break
" 2>/dev/null | head -25
